sys_hub_action_type_definition.annotation: Trigger a Tanium Action on a Tanium-managed endpoint.
sys_hub_action_type_definition.description:
Trigger an "Action" on a Tanium-managed endpoint.
Action Packages can be found in the Action Package [x_taniu_tan_core_tanium_package] table. The "Action Package Parameters" related list on the Action Package form will tell you what parameters to specify (if any) when calling this Flow Action with a given Action Package.
Only CIs in tables which extend the Computer [cmdb_ci_computer] table can be selected as targets for Tanium Actions.
sys_hub_action_type_definition.label_cache: sys_documentation.hint: Specify each package parameter key and value to include with the action request, from the x_taniu_tan_core_tanium_package_parameter table.
sys_documentation.label: Package parameters
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_f46111c81b7cce50216efeee034bcb21

sys_documentation.hint: The number of seconds after which the action will expire (default: 86,400 / 24 hours). If the endpoint is offline when this Action is issued, and remains offline for this duration, the Action will not be deployed on that endpoint.
sys_documentation.label: Expire seconds
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_f46111c81b7cce50216efeee034bcb21

sys_documentation.hint: A reference to an endpoint in the Computer [cmdb_ci_computer] table, or any table that extends it.
sys_documentation.label: Endpoint
sys_documentation.name: var__m_sys_hub_action_input_f46111c81b7cce50216efeee034bcb21

sys_hub_action_type_snapshot.annotation: Trigger a Tanium Action on a Tanium-managed endpoint.
sys_hub_action_type_snapshot.description:
Trigger an "Action" on a Tanium-managed endpoint.
Action Packages can be found in the Action Package [x_taniu_tan_core_tanium_package] table. The "Action Package Parameters" related list on the Action Package form will tell you what parameters to specify (if any) when calling this Flow Action with a given Action Package.
Only CIs in tables which extend the Computer [cmdb_ci_computer] table can be selected as targets for Tanium Actions.
